The man said the day after I had made my promise to him at Sarah's podcast, he had a famous man cancel and needed me that night.

The man said his wife had worked at a shelter for people who were mentally disturbed and the man said his wife had warned him.
The man said his wife had warned him that I was to be avoided at all costs but the man was too trusting and that was the story of his life.
So the next day, when the famous man had canceled on him on the very same day but in the sweetest of ways he decided to ask me.

After all, his wife had worked with the insane for some time in a shelter and should be able to spot a crazy person.
But the man was too trusting.

It was types like this man that types like me looked for. His wife had told him as much. But the man was too trusting. So he got hurt.
